TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lalekeleke, title = Lalekeleke, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lalekeleke} }

S.FORM: alang Lalekeleke ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 154 buwan, 577 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 562 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 97%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Lalekeleke hya' ga Kinayiman. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu

alang Lalekeleke ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 154 buwan, 577 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 562 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 97%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Lalekeleke hya' ga Kinayiman. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu
S.PHON: alaŋ lalekeleke ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu ħaruħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na lalekeleke ħjaʔ ɣa kinajiman. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu
